caveats.summary: D1 scm_pre_rmse uses SciPy SyntheticControl, not inner SyntheticControlCVXPY.
penalty/penalty_strength stored on AugSynthCVXPY but unused on OSQP SCM path.
OC uses level mean_point_effect; summary() uses relative effect estimand.
Hull stress uses z-distance proxy, not true convex hull membership.

config.n_mc_reduction_reason: 19-world grid runtime in dev environment; harness default n_mc=14 for replay

findings.summary: Stratified OC with D5-DIAG fields across 19 worlds (n_mc=4).
AugSynth point beats A26 MAE on 4/7 weak-fit worlds @ 8%.
Fidelity audit caveats G1/G4/G7/G8 carried in artifact metadata; interpret diagnostics as provisional comparators only.
n_mc=4 (<14): 19-world grid runtime in dev environment; harness default n_mc=14 for replay.
